page: Microsoft Azure NC288ds_xl_RTXPRO6000BSE_v6 is a high-capacity GPU-accelerated server instance powered by an Intel processor with x86_64 architecture. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this virtual machine features 288 dedicated vCPUs and 1032.0 GB of system memory, yielding approximately 3.58 GB of RAM per core.

The instance is equipped with a single GPU and includes 15841 GB of local storage. It is also Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance external disk configurations. No complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included with this instance.

Given its massive dedicated vCPU count, substantial local storage, and GPU acceleration, this server is designed for highly parallelized workloads. It is well-suited for large-scale data processing, GPU-accelerated simulations, and database hosting. The hardware profile offers high resource density, balancing massive compute capacity with extensive local storage for data-intensive operations.
description: Microsoft Azure NC288ds_xl_RTXPRO6000BSE_v6 is a high-capacity, GPU-accelerated server instance built on the x86_64 architecture with an Intel processor. Operating under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, it features 288 dedicated vCPUs and 1032.0 GB of system memory, providing 3.58 GB of RAM per core. The server is equipped with a single GPU and a massive 15841 GB of local storage, and it supports Premium Storage configurations. With no complimentary public IPv4 addresses, this instance is designed for secure, high-density workloads. The combination of extensive local storage, a dedicated GPU, and a high vCPU count makes this server highly efficient for parallel processing, large-scale database hosting, and GPU-accelerated computing tasks.
